body.title: Layer 3 brick: DECOMPOSE engram
body.result: All 8 Layer 3 TEMPLATE nodes seeded with full tests (1305 passing). Session 2026-04-01h.
body.description: Design and seed DECOMPOSE as a TEMPLATE Memory node. Takes parsed_goal from basket, emits ordered sub-goals list and dependency map to basket. Re-entrant — can be called again after OBSERVE. Layer 3 cognitive stdlib (D297).
